## Type

- [ ] `docs:` Documentation update
- [ ] `feat:` New agent, document, or feature
- [ ] `fix:` Correction to existing content
- [ ] `refactor:` Reorganization without content change

## Checklist

- [ ] Front matter valid on all new/modified docs
- [ ] `npm run lint:md` passes
- [ ] Cross-references checked (`npm run check:cross-refs`)
- [ ] No CRA compliance concerns
- [ ] Agent routing table updated (if agents changed in `.github/copilot/`)
- [ ] Related documents updated (cascade effects noted below)
